name: Montana
why_ruby_pro: MT Department of Revenue control-state compliance built into every order workflow
MCA Title 16 excise tax calculations automated on all wine and beer transactions
Agency liquor store quota rules and license restrictions enforced automatically
problem: Montana's control-state spirits rules and agency store network managed manually
Title 16 excise filings assembled from disconnected data with every reporting cycle
Quota license limits and DOR reporting creating constant compliance pressure
difference: Auto-enforce Montana DOR control-state rules on every applicable order
Built-in Title 16 excise reporting directly from your live transaction data
Navigate Montana's agency store and quota system without manual tracking
how_it_works: Every account tagged with DOR license class and control-state status automatically
One-click Title 16 excise reports generated from actual orders and inventory
See route profitability and account health across all Montana territories
